name: prompt-to-asset
description: Prompt enhancer + asset pipeline: one brief to iOS/Android/PWA/favicon/OG via routed image models.
long_description: Turn a one-line brief into a complete, ship-ready asset bundle — app icons, favicons, OG images, illustrations, splash screens. Three modes: inline_svg (zero-key, host LLM writes the SVG), external_prompt_only (paste into your subscription), api (server-driven via OpenAI / Gemini / Ideogram / Recraft / Flux / Stability / Leonardo / fal.ai / Replicate / HF / Cloudflare / Pollinations / Stable Horde / ComfyUI). 17 MCP tools including asset_enhance_prompt, asset_generate_logo / app_icon / favicon / og_image / illustration / hero / splash_screen, asset_save_inline_svg, asset_ingest_external, asset_train_brand_lora.

GEMINI_API_KEY.title: Google AI Studio key (free tier — ~1,500 img/day)
GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Get from https://aistudio.google.com/apikey. No credit card. Routes to Gemini 3 Flash Image (Nano Banana).

OPENAI_API_KEY.title: OpenAI key
OPENAI_API_KEY.description: gpt-image-1 / gpt-image-1.5 / dall-e-3. Best for native-RGBA transparent PNGs.

BFL_API_KEY.title: Black Forest Labs Flux key
BFL_API_KEY.description: Flux Pro / Flux.2 / Kontext — photoreal hero art.

FAL_API_KEY.title: fal.ai key
FAL_API_KEY.description: Aggregator — alt path for Flux / SDXL.

HF_TOKEN.title: Hugging Face token (free tier)
HF_TOKEN.description: Read token from https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens. No credit card.

REPLICATE_API_TOKEN.title: Replicate token
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN.description: Flux 1.1 Pro / SDXL / SD3 / Recraft V3 / Ideogram V3.

P2A_MAX_SPEND_USD_PER_RUN.title: Cost cap (USD per tool call)
P2A_MAX_SPEND_USD_PER_RUN.description: Optional. Pre-flight refuses api-mode calls above this cap.
